themes.exampleQuote: Our server Morgan had an amazing smile and great customer service — quick, efficient, and always had refills ready.
These beef and pepper noodles are legit. Dumplings sampler was a hit as well.
Service was very pleasant and super quick.
This is going to be a repeat when we come back to town for sure.
Didi the robot was fun to watch.
Everything was great, but the bathroom was not clean.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers rave about specific servers by name, standout dumplings and noodle dishes, and a fun robot server, with the only real complaint being an unclean bathroom.
notable_quote: She held amazing conversation and made the experience very welcoming and rememberable.
